title: 工具执行成功: read_file
content:
from core.memory_layers import LongTermMemory

ltm = LongTermMemory('memory/long_term')
results = ltm.search_items('长期记忆 检索 memory', limit=5)
print('item_index', len(ltm.item_index))
print('summary_index', len(ltm.index))
print('results', len(results))
for r in results[:3]:
    print(r.item.kind, r.item.title[:60], round(r.score, 3), r.reason[:80])

raw_observation.tool_output:
from core.memory_layers import LongTermMemory

ltm = LongTermMemory('memory/long_term')
results = ltm.search_items('长期记忆 检索 memory', limit=5)
print('item_index', len(ltm.item_index))
print('summary_index', len(ltm.index))
print('results', len(results))
for r in results[:3]:
    print(r.item.kind, r.item.title[:60], round(r.score, 3), r.reason[:80])
